abilities.name: Calculated Assault
abilities.rawDescription:
Each Round: 20% chance to reduce Physical Damage Dealt, excluding Basic Attacks, by 12% for the enemy with the highest Strength for 2 rounds.

Rounds 2, 4, 7, and 9: Deal Tactical Damage to the enemy with the least troops at a 100% Damage Rate.

At 6+ Stars:

Rounds 3, 5, 8, and 10: Deal Fire Damage to all enemies that deal Physical Damage, excluding Basic Attacks, at a 40% Damage Rate. This damage is increased by 1.5x against targets afflicted with Burn, increasing the Damage Rate to 60%.

activationRoll.description: One chance each round to reduce the highest-Strength enemy non-Basic Physical Damage Dealt.

effects.target: 1 enemy in any lane with the highest Strength

notes: Mitigated by target Intelligence.
Exact resource-state timing is unresolved.

unresolvedQuestions: Highest-Strength ties.
Least-troops ties and resource-state timing.
Enemy output-capability qualification against unknown enemy formation members.

abilities.name: Champion's Brilliance
abilities.rawDescription: At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard: Strength, Intelligence, and Instinct +15 for Feskar; Right Flank ally Damage Received -8%.

abilities.name: Resilient Bond
abilities.rawDescription: Start of combat: grant Feskar and one other adjacent ally one Resilient Bond stack. Later rounds: if that tracked ally retreated in the previous round, grant Feskar one additional stack. Each stack reduces Physical Damage Received from non-Basic Attacks until end of combat.

references.description: The adjacent ally selected at start of combat is referenced by later-round retreat checks.

rawDescriptions.rawDescription:
Each Round: 20% chance to reduce Physical Damage Dealt, excluding Basic Attacks, by 12% for the enemy with the highest Strength for 2 rounds.

Rounds 2, 4, 7, and 9: Deal Tactical Damage to the enemy with the least troops at a 100% Damage Rate.

At 6+ Stars:

Rounds 3, 5, 8, and 10: Deal Fire Damage to all enemies that deal Physical Damage, excluding Basic Attacks, at a 40% Damage Rate. This damage is increased by 1.5x against targets afflicted with Burn, increasing the Damage Rate to 60%.
At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard: Strength, Intelligence, and Instinct +15 for Feskar; Right Flank ally Damage Received -8%.

Start of combat: grant Feskar and one other adjacent ally one Resilient Bond stack. Later rounds: if that tracked ally retreated in the previous round, grant Feskar one additional stack. Each stack reduces Physical Damage Received from non-Basic Attacks until end of combat.
Start of combat: increase Instinct of 3 Allies in any lane until end of combat, enhanced by Feskar Instinct. Plain Allies includes Feskar.
Command augmentation for Calculated Assault: Rounds 3, 5, 8, and 10 deal Fire Damage to all enemies that deal Physical Damage excluding Basic Attacks; Burn increases damage by 1.5x per target.
Start of combat until end of combat: increase Feskar Intelligence and Initiative.
Each round: one activation chance to Stagger 1 enemy in any lane, prioritizing Warrior role, for 3 rounds.
